name: bkper-cli
description: Adds Bkper CLI guidance for safe Bkper data, reporting, app development, and accounting-support workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Bkper CLI guidance for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Bkper's accounting model, reference docs, and CLI guardrails from Codex when working with Bkper data, reporting, taxes, apps, SDKs, and financial workflows.
